verses.1: Now you shall gather yourself in troops,
verses.3: Therefore he will abandon them until the time that she who is in labor gives birth.
verses.4: He shall stand, and shall shepherd in the strength of the LORD,
verses.5: He will be our peace when Assyria invades our land
verses.6: They will rule the land of Assyria with the sword,
verses.7: The remnant of Jacob will be among many peoples
verses.8: The remnant of Jacob will be among the nations,
verses.9: Let your hand be lifted up above your adversaries,
verses.10: “It will happen in that day”, says the LORD,
verses.11: I will cut off the cities of your land
verses.12: I will destroy witchcraft from your hand.
verses.13: I will cut off your engraved images and your pillars from among you;
verses.14: I will uproot your Asherah poles from among you;
verses.15: I will execute vengeance in anger
